title: Gin Turns on Sanji — Part 6
scene: On pages 20–21, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Gin is ordered to kill Sanji, but his debt and sympathy clash with Don Krieg’s brutal command.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Say that to me one more time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've never been treated so kindly by another person,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's why... I just can't kill this man!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This time, we'll be expanding to 3 pages!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So let's set sail, USOPP gallery Pirates!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
